title: Wholesome Peruvian Quinoa Salad
description: A vibrant, cultured quinoa salad with fresh vegetables, bright citrus dressing, and a subtle shio-cure seasoning. Perfect for a healthy, no-onion, no-garlic lunch.

ingredients.name: Quinoa
ingredients.notes: rigorously rinsed until water runs clear

instructions: Rinse quinoa under cold running water until the water runs clear.
Bring vegetable stock to a boil in a medium saucepan, add quinoa, reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 15 minutes until quinoa is fluffy.
Remove saucepan from heat and let quinoa sit, covered, for 5 minutes, then fluff with a fork.
In a large bowl, combine cooked quinoa, diced cucumber, diced red bell pepper, diced avocado, halved cherry tomatoes, and chopped cilantro.
Whisk lemon juice, olive oil, shio-cure salt, sea salt, and black pepper in a small bowl until the dressing is emulsified.
Pour the dressing over the salad and gently toss until all ingredients are evenly coated.
Taste the salad and adjust seasoning, adding more sea salt or pepper if desired.
Refrigerate the salad for at least 15 minutes to allow flavors to meld before serving.
